context_text:
The AI agent began at a location near Wuhan’s Hankou Riverfront and systematically visited the nearest unvisited Points of Interest (POIs) in sequence:  
1. **汉口江滩三阳广场停车点** (197 m, 0.1°),  
2. **沿江大道三阳路(公交站)** (146 m, 28.25°),  
3. **天悦外滩金融中心停车场** (218 m, 286.48°).  

At each stop, it scanned the environment to update its visible POI list (reducing from 20 → 19 → 18), prioritizing proximity and unvisited status. All moves succeeded via road-network pathfinding. The agent is now at 天悦外滩金融中心停车场, ready for the next scan and decision.
The AI agent sequentially visited the three nearest unvisited points of interest (POIs):  
1. **天悦外滩金融中心** (66 m, 10.97°),  
2. **匠心城-三阳中心B座** (86 m, 272.06°),  
3. **三阳路中山大道(公交站)** (79 m, 274.24°).  

Each visit was followed by an environment scan to update visible POIs. Distances and directions shifted slightly after each move due to repositioning. After visiting the third POI, 14 unvisited POIs remain—mostly farther away (>140 m), with the closest now being **延庆小区** (143 m) and **包豪斯大厦** (199 m). The agent continues its exploration loop.
The AI agent sequentially visited nearby points of interest (POIs) starting from **延庆小区**, then moved to the nearest unvisited visible POIs: **包豪斯大厦** (55 m), **永胜大厦** (70 m), and **延庆里停车场** (64 m). At each location, it scanned the environment to update its list of visible POIs—reducing from 13 to 12 to 11—prioritizing proximity and unvisited status. The agent operated within a road-network navigation framework and stopped due to reaching the maximum iteration limit.
The agent systematically visited 5 POIs—**公安宿舍**, **运征大厦**, **柏林公寓**, **沿江大道粤汉码头(公交站)**, and **汉口江滩西北7门停车场**—in order of increasing proximity (95m → 66m → 278m → 152m → 77m), moving via shortest road-network paths (2–5 steps, 65–592m). Each visit was followed by an environmental rescan, reducing the visible unvisited POI count from 10 to 6. The current nearest unvisited POI is **汉口江滩西北7门停车场** (77 m, 91.6°), and the agent is about to move there.
The AI agent systematically visited six nearby points of interest (POIs) in sequence—starting with 汉口江滩西北7门停车场 and ending with 知音号码头—each time moving to the nearest unvisited POI identified via environment scanning. After visiting all initially visible POIs, no new ones were detected; two southward exploration attempts (including one at 180°) failed to reveal additional POIs. The agent terminated due to reaching the maximum iteration limit.

evaluation_result.context_text:
The AI agent began at a location near Wuhan’s Hankou Riverfront and systematically visited the nearest unvisited Points of Interest (POIs) in sequence:  
1. **汉口江滩三阳广场停车点** (197 m, 0.1°),  
2. **沿江大道三阳路(公交站)** (146 m, 28.25°),  
3. **天悦外滩金融中心停车场** (218 m, 286.48°).  

At each stop, it scanned the environment to update its visible POI list (reducing from 20 → 19 → 18), prioritizing proximity and unvisited status. All moves succeeded via road-network pathfinding. The agent is now at 天悦外滩金融中心停车场, ready for the next scan and decision.
The AI agent sequentially visited the three nearest unvisited points of interest (POIs):  
1. **天悦外滩金融中心** (66 m, 10.97°),  
2. **匠心城-三阳中心B座** (86 m, 272.06°),  
3. **三阳路中山大道(公交站)** (79 m, 274.24°).  

Each visit was followed by an environment scan to update visible POIs. Distances and directions shifted slightly after each move due to repositioning. After visiting the third POI, 14 unvisited POIs remain—mostly farther away (>140 m), with the closest now being **延庆小区** (143 m) and **包豪斯大厦** (199 m). The agent continues its exploration loop.
The AI agent sequentially visited nearby points of interest (POIs) starting from **延庆小区**, then moved to the nearest unvisited visible POIs: **包豪斯大厦** (55 m), **永胜大厦** (70 m), and **延庆里停车场** (64 m). At each location, it scanned the environment to update its list of visible POIs—reducing from 13 to 12 to 11—prioritizing proximity and unvisited status. The agent operated within a road-network navigation framework and stopped due to reaching the maximum iteration limit.
The agent systematically visited 5 POIs—**公安宿舍**, **运征大厦**, **柏林公寓**, **沿江大道粤汉码头(公交站)**, and **汉口江滩西北7门停车场**—in order of increasing proximity (95m → 66m → 278m → 152m → 77m), moving via shortest road-network paths (2–5 steps, 65–592m). Each visit was followed by an environmental rescan, reducing the visible unvisited POI count from 10 to 6. The current nearest unvisited POI is **汉口江滩西北7门停车场** (77 m, 91.6°), and the agent is about to move there.
The AI agent systematically visited six nearby points of interest (POIs) in sequence—starting with 汉口江滩西北7门停车场 and ending with 知音号码头—each time moving to the nearest unvisited POI identified via environment scanning. After visiting all initially visible POIs, no new ones were detected; two southward exploration attempts (including one at 180°) failed to reveal additional POIs. The agent terminated due to reaching the maximum iteration limit.
